description: Interactive filter builder UI that lets users add, edit, and remove filters using field definitions. Renders active filters as TmFilterChip components with a field picker, operator selector, and value input. Supports text, number, date, boolean, select, and multi-select field types.

parameters.name: OnFiltersChanged
parameters.description: Fires whenever the filter list changes.

parameters.name: ShowClearAll
parameters.description: Show the "Clear all" button when filters are active.

parameters.name: DisplayResolver
parameters.description: Universal display resolver for field labels and enum filter values. Typically passed from parent TmDataTable or TmMultiViewList.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class for the root element.

examples.title: Filter definitions setup
